member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Data.IPlayerService
member.summary: Service for managing player state during combat sessions. Loads persistent data from the database and calculates combat stats.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Data.IPlayerService.GetOrCreateAsync(Discord.WebSocket.SocketUser,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets or creates a player state for combat using Discord user information. Loads from database if exists, creates new record if not.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Data.IPlayerService.GetOrCreateAsync(System.UInt64,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets or creates a player state for combat using ID and username. Loads from database if exists, creates new record if not. This overload is useful for testing without Discord dependencies.
member.param: The player's unique ID (Discord user ID or test ID).

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Data.IPlayerService.SaveProgressAsync(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves session progress back to the database. Updates XP, gold, kills, deaths, and highest dungeon level. Returns information about any skill level-ups.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Data.IPlayerService.GetPlayerDataAsync(System.UInt64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a player's persistent state from the repository. Returns a suitable for core usage, or null if not found.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Data.PlayerService
member.summary: Implementation of integrating database persistence with combat state. Handles player creation, stat calculation, and progress saving.
member.remarks: Constructs the player service with required dependencies.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Data.PlayerService.#ctor(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Data.IPlayerRepository,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IPlayerProgressionService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Data.PlayerService})
member.summary: Implementation of integrating database persistence with combat state. Handles player creation, stat calculation, and progress saving.
member.remarks: Constructs the player service with required dependencies.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Data.PlayerService.GetOrCreateAsync(System.UInt64,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets or creates a player by Discord user ID and username, then calculates combat stats.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Data.PlayerService.SaveProgressAsync(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves player progress after a session, updating XP, gold, kills, deaths, and detecting level-ups.
member.param: True if player died during session.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Data.PlayerService.GetPlayerDataAsync(System.UInt64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the persisted player state by ID.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Data.SaveProgressResult
member.summary: Result of saving player progress, including any level-ups.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Data.SaveProgressResult.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Data.SkillLevelUp})
member.summary: Result of saving player progress, including any level-ups.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Data.SkillLevelUp
member.summary: Represents a skill level-up event.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Data.SkillLevelUp.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Represents a skill level-up event.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.DiscordBackgroundService
member.summary: Background service that initializes and runs the Discord client and command modules.
Background service that initializes and runs the Discord client and command modules.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.DiscordBackgroundService.ExecuteAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts the Discord client, registers command modules and wires up event handlers. The method blocks until cancellation is requested.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.DiscordBackgroundService.StopAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stops and logs out the Discord client if connected, then delegates to base.StopAsync.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.DiscordEventHandler
member.summary: Handles Discord events (messages and button interactions) for the adventure bot. Routes text commands to the command service and combat actions to the session manager.

remarks.para: Message handling and button interactions are queued to a background worker to avoid blocking the Discord gateway connection.
Button interactions are parsed from custom IDs in the format "action-{actionId}-{channelId}".

member.summary: Handles Discord events (messages and button interactions) for the adventure bot. Routes text commands to the command service and combat actions to the session manager.

remarks.para: Message handling and button interactions are queued to a background worker to avoid blocking the Discord gateway connection.
Button interactions are parsed from custom IDs in the format "action-{actionId}-{channelId}".

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.DiscordEventHandler.OnMessageReceivedAsync(Discord.WebSocket.SocketMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handles incoming Discord messages, routing commands to the command service. Non-command messages are ignored.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.DiscordEventHandler.OnButtonExecutedAsync(Discord.WebSocket.SocketMessageComponent,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handles combat action button clicks from players. Parses the action from the button's custom ID and records it in the session.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.DiscordSettings
member.summary: Configuration settings for Discord integration. Bound from configuration (e.g. "Discord" section).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.DiscordSettings.Token
member.summary: Bot token used to login the Discord client.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.DiscordSettings.Prefix
member.summary: The prefix used for commands (e.g. !admin say hello).

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Modules.AdminModule
member.summary: Discord command module for admin-only commands.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Modules.AdminModule.SayAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Echoes the provided message back to the channel.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Modules.AdventureModule
member.summary: Discord command module for starting adventures, running simulations, and viewing player stats. Handles the main adventure loop and player interaction commands.
Discord command module for starting adventures, running simulations, and viewing player stats. Handles the main adventure loop and player interaction commands.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Modules.AdventureModule.StartAsync
member.summary: Starts a new adventure session in the current channel.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Modules.AdventureModule.SimulateAsync
member.summary: Runs a headless combat simulation of 4 players vs respawning mobs.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Modules.AdventureModule.StatsAsync
member.summary: Displays the current player's skills, XP, and lifetime statistics.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.QueuedBackgroundService
member.summary: Background service that processes queued work items from . Ensures CPU/IO-heavy tasks are executed outside Discord event handlers for responsiveness.
member.remarks: Uses a single-threaded loop to dequeue and execute work items, logging errors and shutdown events.
Constructs the background service with the required work queue and logger.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.QueuedBackgroundService.#ctor(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.IBackgroundWorkQueue,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.QueuedBackgroundService})
member.summary: Background service that processes queued work items from . Ensures CPU/IO-heavy tasks are executed outside Discord event handlers for responsiveness.
member.remarks: Uses a single-threaded loop to dequeue and execute work items, logging errors and shutdown events.
Constructs the background service with the required work queue and logger.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.QueuedBackgroundService.ExecuteAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Main execution loop for the background service. Dequeues and runs work items until shutdown.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering Discord Adventure services and configuration with DI.
Registers all Discord Adventure services, settings, and dependencies with the DI container.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSession
member.summary: Represents an active adventure session in a Discord channel. Contains all mutable state for an ongoing combat encounter.

remarks.para: Sessions are managed per-channel and persist across multiple combat rounds.
Access to session state should be synchronized using or the helper extension methods defined in .

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSession.ChannelId
member.summary: The Discord channel ID where this session is active. Used as the primary key for session lookup.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSession.Level
member.summary: Current dungeon level (difficulty scaling). Increases after defeating all mobs in the current wave.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSession.Players
member.summary: All players in the session, including human players and AI bots. Modified during combat as players join, die, or flee.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSession.Mobs
member.summary: All mobs in the current combat encounter. Cleared and repopulated when advancing to a new level.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSession.PendingActions
member.summary: Actions submitted by players for the upcoming round. Keyed by player ID. Cleared after each round resolves.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSession.LastActivity
member.summary: Timestamp of the last activity in this session. Used for timeout detection and cleanup.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSession.RoundCts
member.summary: Cancellation token source for the current round timer. Cancelled when the round ends or session is terminated.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSession.Semaphore
member.summary: Semaphore for thread-safe access to session state. Ensures only one operation modifies the session at a time.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSession.CombatMessageId
member.summary: Discord message ID of the current combat status message. Updated each round to show current action counts and party status.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSessionExtensions
member.summary: Convenience extensions for acquiring and using per-session locks safely.
Lock the session identified by and execute the provided function. Throws if the session is not found.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSessionExtensions.LockAsync(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSession,System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lock the given session and execute the provided function while holding the session semaphore.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSessionManager
member.summary: Manages per-channel adventure sessions. Provides thread-safe creation, lookup, action recording, round execution, and session termination.
member.remarks: Sessions are stored in the dictionary keyed by Discord channel ID. Public methods use internal locking to ensure session state is updated safely from concurrent Discord events.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSessionManager.#ctor(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IGameEngine,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Data.IPlayerService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSessionManager})
member.summary: Manages per-channel adventure sessions. Provides thread-safe creation, lookup, action recording, round execution, and session termination.
member.remarks: Sessions are stored in the dictionary keyed by Discord channel ID. Public methods use internal locking to ensure session state is updated safely from concurrent Discord events.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSessionManager.Sessions
member.summary: Active sessions keyed by Discord channel ID.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSessionManager.StartSessionAsync(System.UInt64,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts a new session for the specified channel and level.
member.param: Discord channel id where the session will run.
Starting dungeon level for the session.
Cancellation token to observe when creating the session.
member.exception: Thrown when a session cannot be added for the channel.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSessionManager.RecordActionAsync(System.UInt64,Discord.WebSocket.SocketUser,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerAction,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Records a player's action for the specified channel using a Discord . Ensures the player entity exists and is added to the session before recording the action.
member.param: Channel id where the action originated.
Discord user who performed the action.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSessionManager.RecordActionAsync(System.UInt64,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerId,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerAction,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Records a player's action for the specified channel using a . Updates the session's pending actions and last activity timestamp.
member.param: Channel id where the action originated.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSessionManager.ExecuteRoundAsync(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSession,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a single round for the provided session by delegating to the . Updates the session state with the returned .
member.param: Active session to execute a round for.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSessionManager.EndSessionAsync(System.UInt64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Ends and removes the session for the given channel, persists player progress, and returns summary results.
member.param: Channel id of the session to end.
member.returns: A containing the ended session and any level-ups.
member.exception: Thrown if the session could not be removed.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.BackgroundWorkQueue
member.summary: Simple bounded background work queue used to offload CPU/IO work from Discord event handlers. Stores delegates of the form Func<CancellationToken, Task> and exposes dequeue/queue operations.
member.remarks: The queue uses a single reader / multiple writer bounded channel to provide backpressure and to ensure tasks are processed sequentially by a single background worker.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.BackgroundWorkQueue.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new bounded with the provided capacity.
member.param: Maximum number of queued work items before backpressure is applied.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.BackgroundWorkQueue.QueueAsync(System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enqueues a delegate to be executed by a background consumer. This method waits when the channel is full to provide backpressure.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.BackgroundWorkQueue.DequeueAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Dequeues the next work delegate. This call blocks until an item becomes available or the provided cancellation token is triggered.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.IBackgroundWorkQueue
member.summary: Lightweight producer/consumer queue used to offload work from Discord event handlers to background consumers.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.IBackgroundWorkQueue.QueueAsync(System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enqueue a work item to be executed in the background.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.IBackgroundWorkQueue.DequeueAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Dequeue a work item. Intended to be used by a dedicated consumer.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.IMobFactoryService
member.summary: Factory service responsible for creating instances from presets and scaling them for a given dungeon level.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.IMobFactoryService.CreateFromPresetAsync(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobPresetDto,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a mob from an explicit preset and scale it for the provided level.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.IMobFactoryService.CreateRandomMobForLevelAsync(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Int32},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Choose a preset (optionally excluding some ids) and create a mob scaled for the provided level. Returns null when no preset could be chosen.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.MessageService
member.summary: Helper for building and sending adventure-related Discord messages. Encapsulates logic for creating combat components, posting round information, and updating the persistent combat message used to collect player actions.
member.remarks: This class resolves the target channel from an and is intended to be used from background services and event handlers. Methods do not throw on missing channels and instead log warnings to keep Discord event handling resilient.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.MessageService.#ctor(Discord.WebSocket.DiscordSocketClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.MessageService},Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService)
member.summary: Helper for building and sending adventure-related Discord messages. Encapsulates logic for creating combat components, posting round information, and updating the persistent combat message used to collect player actions.
member.remarks: This class resolves the target channel from an and is intended to be used from background services and event handlers. Methods do not throw on missing channels and instead log warnings to keep Discord event handling resilient.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.MessageService.SendRoundInformationAsync(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSession,System.Int32,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Sends an initial round information message to the session channel containing a teaser, mob details, and the next-round timestamp.
member.param: Session containing channel and mob data.
Round number within the current level.
Timestamp for when the next round will begin.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.MessageService.UpdateCombatButtonsAsync(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSession)
member.summary: Updates the existing persistent combat message's button components to reflect current action counts from .

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.MessageService.SendCombatMessageAsync(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSession)
member.summary: Sends the combat action buttons as a new message for the session and stores the message id on the provided session so it can be updated later.
Sends a new combat message containing action buttons for the session and stores the message id on the session for subsequent updates.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.MessageService.DeleteCombatMessageAsync(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSession)
member.summary: Deletes the session's stored combat message if one exists and clears the id. This is safe to call even if the id is null.
Deletes and clears the session's stored combat message id. Safe to call if no id exists.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.MessageService.UpdateCombatMessageAsync(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSession)
member.summary: Rebuilds the combat component (refreshing the per-action counts) and updates the existing combat message stored on the session. This is intentionally the same behavior as UpdateCombatButtonsAsync but provided under the name expected by the event handler.
Rebuilds and applies the combat component to the stored combat message. Provided for compatibility with event handler naming.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.MessageService.PostRoundResultsAsync(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.AdventureSession,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.RoundResult,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Posts the compact combat log and a status summary for the completed round to the session channel.
member.param: The session the round belongs to.
Round result including player/mob states and messages.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.MobFactoryService
member.summary: Service for creating instances from presets and level scaling. Encapsulates logic for randomizing mob stats and selecting unused presets.
member.remarks: Used to generate mobs for each round, ensuring variety and appropriate difficulty scaling.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.MobFactoryService.#ctor(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Data.IMobPresetService,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IRandomNumberGenerator,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.MobFactoryService})
member.summary: Service for creating instances from presets and level scaling. Encapsulates logic for randomizing mob stats and selecting unused presets.
member.remarks: Used to generate mobs for each round, ensuring variety and appropriate difficulty scaling.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.MobFactoryService.CreateFromPresetAsync(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobPresetDto,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a from a given preset and level, applying stat randomization and scaling.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.MobFactoryService.CreateRandomMobForLevelAsync(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Int32},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a random mob for the given level, excluding specified preset IDs.
member.param: Preset IDs to exclude from selection.
member.returns: Newly created or null if no preset is available.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.SessionEndResult
member.summary: Result of ending a session, including level-up information for all players.
member.param: The ended session with final state.
Dictionary mapping player IDs to their skill level-ups during the session.

member.summary: Result of ending a session, including level-up information for all players.
member.param: The ended session with final state.
Dictionary mapping player IDs to their skill level-ups during the session.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.SessionEndResult.Session
member.summary: The ended session with final state.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.Services.SessionEndResult.LevelUps
member.summary: Dictionary mapping player IDs to their skill level-ups during the session.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.SocketMessageComponentExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for parsing Discord component custom IDs for player actions.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Discord.SocketMessageComponentExtensions.TryParseActionId(Discord.WebSocket.SocketMessageComponent,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerAction@,System.UInt64@)
member.summary: Attempts to parse an action custom id from the Discord component. Expected format: "action-{actionValue}-{channelId}".
member.returns: True if parsing succeeded; otherwise false.
